buyer_dependent_items.text: Return signed NDA to unlock deeper process and technical discussions

competitive_position.summary: No competitor has been identified in any available evidence (Salesforce fields, Next Steps, tasks, or Avoma calls). The deal may be sole-sourced, or the buyer has not yet disclosed their shortlist or incumbent. For a $200K enterprise S2P suite evaluation, it is statistically likely that alternatives exist but have not been surfaced. The absence of competitive intelligence 50+ days into the deal is a meaningful blind spot. Proactively positioning Zycus's differentiation (Merlin AI, unified S2P suite, LATAM experience) and discovering the competitive landscape in the post-NDA technical discussions is a strategic priority.

champion_strength.source: Salesforce Next Step 22 Jun 2026; recent task contacts; account-level contact roster
champion_strength.summary: Miroslava Sarahi (Analyst of Procurement Negotiations) is the primary contact and is developing as a potential champion. She organized the 23 Jun discovery session and has been the consistent thread across recent activity, but her analyst-level role limits her authority to drive budget approval or executive sponsorship. No evidence yet of champion-level advocacy behaviors (EB/DM introductions, shared internal docs, pushing back on competitors, driving the agenda). Account-level contacts Julio García (Director) and Claudia Hermosillo (Gerente) are senior enough to champion but not yet engaged. Champion strength is 'developing' because Miroslava is engaged and facilitating multi-stakeholder access, but lacks seniority and demonstrated advocacy.

sources: Salesforce Next Step 22 Jun 2026 (Miroslava, Christian, Olivia, Jorge—no EB-level role)
Account-level contacts: Julio García (Director), Claudia Hermosillo (Gerente)—not yet engaged in opp
meddpicc_economic_buyer.narrative: No Economic Buyer identified or engaged. The 23 Jun discovery session included Miroslava (Analyst of Procurement Negotiations), Christian, Olivia, and Jorge, per the 22 Jun Next Step; none of these roles carry budget authority for a $200K enterprise SaaS investment. Miroslava is analyst-level; Christian, Olivia, and Jorge are not titled in any Salesforce contact role or account-level contact record, so their seniority and authority are unknown. The account-level contacts include Julio García (Director de Cadena de Suministro) and Claudia Hermosillo (Gerente Compras Institucionales), both of whom could plausibly hold or influence budget approval, but neither has been engaged in a recorded buyer-facing call or added to the opportunity contact roles. No Salesforce field (X10a_Sponsor__c, Who_will_approve_budget__c, Executive_Sponsor_Identified__c) names the EB. For a $200K enterprise S2P deal in a large LATAM account (Corporativo Fragua / Cargill affiliation), budget approval will require Director or VP-level sponsorship and likely CFO sign-off. Without EB identification and active engagement in the next 14 days, pricing and commercial discussions will stall. The immediate move is to ask Miroslava directly in the post-discovery follow-up: 'Who will approve the budget and sign the contract for this initiative?' and to request an introduction to that person within 7 days.

recommended_moves: Ask Miroslava who approves budget and signs the contract, and request introduction within 7 days.
Debrief 23 Jun discovery session with Karson and document buyer's stated pain points, key drivers, and current challenges in Salesforce.
Confirm NDA signature status and escalate if stalled beyond 48 hours.
